mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, item_id as itemId, name, avatar, description, time from favorite where user_id = #{userId} order by time desc
select id, user_id as userId, item_id as itemId, name, avatar, description, time from favorite where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into favorite (user_id, item_id, name, avatar, description, time) values (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{description}, #{time})
